finding: `team plan` / `team validate` reject imported cross-repo planning tasks whose `scopePaths` are absolute 3KLife paths, so Phase 0 planning tasks cannot start through Team Agents even after broker cleanup.
expectedBehavior: Team Agents should normalize or classify cross-repo planning paths before building `file.write` leases, or choose a read-only/planning recipe that does not request unsafe writes.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by deriving Team Agents write scope from target repo paths only: `targetAllowedFiles` is authoritative when present, target-root absolute paths normalize to repo-relative write leases, and planning-repo absolute paths become read-only planning context instead of `file.write` lease paths. `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case permission-lease` now creates a temp target/planning repo fixture and proves planning absolute paths do not raise `ATM_TEAM_WRITE_SCOPE_TRAVERSAL` or emit an empty `file.write` lease.
followUp: Keep the cross-repo planning fixture in `scripts/validate-team-agents.ts`; future Team Agents scope changes must preserve target-write fail-closed behavior while allowing planning-only absolute context.
